title: K-200 Airframe Maintenance Procedure
text:
# K-200 Airframe Maintenance Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-486-A. Revision: A. Type: manual. Author: Tyler Moss. Created: 2024-04-05. Last modified: 2024-07-29. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Airframe subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1127, P-1097, P-1090, P-1140.
